name: Farmhouse Vegetable Soup (English)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and coarsely chop the carrots, onions, leek, and celery.
2. Melt the butter in a large saucepan and add the chopped vegetables.
3. Saute for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the vegetables are soft.
4. Peel the potatoes and cut into small chunks.
5. Add the potatoes, bouquet garni, stock, salt, and pepper to the saucepan with enough water to cover the vegetables.
6. Bring to a boil and simmer for 45 minutes.
7. Remove the bouquet garni and serve. The potatoes will thicken the soup and may disappear into the liquid. The vegetables can be diced or finely chopped using a food processor if preferred.
